Hybrid OTP pipeline (already enabled in code)
=============================================

1. User signs up → server generates 6-digit OTP (stored in MongoDB)
2. Server calls Resend API
   - SUCCESS → email_sent: true → user checks inbox
   - FAIL    → email_sent: false + verification_code in response → yellow box on verify page
3. User verifies → same login, interview limits, Gemini usage either way

Railway variable (default true, keep on until domain is verified):
  OTP_EMAIL_FALLBACK_ENABLED=true

After domain works for everyone, you can set OTP_EMAIL_FALLBACK_ENABLED=false
to require inbox-only (optional).

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Why Resend "does not work" for OTP
==================================

Your API key is fine. Resend returns 403 when:

  FROM = onboarding@resend.dev  (test sender)
  TO   = any email EXCEPT your Resend account login email

So OTP never arrives in Gmail for random users until you verify a domain.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
OPTION A — Production (recommended): verify your domain
----------------------------------------------------------------------

1. https://resend.com/domains → Add domain (e.g. yourdomain.com)
2. Add DNS records Resend shows → wait until Status = Verified
3. Railway (soothing-creativity → Variables):

   RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxx          (from Resend → API Keys)
   EMAIL_FROM=Interview Copilot <noreply@yourdomain.com>
   RESEND_ALLOWED_TEST_EMAIL=      (delete or leave empty)

4. Redeploy backend

----------------------------------------------------------------------
OPTION B — Quick test (no domain): only your Resend login email
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Railway variables:

   RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxx
   EMAIL_FROM=Interview Copilot <onboarding@resend.dev>
   RESEND_ALLOWED_TEST_EMAIL=riyanishtha@gmail.com

Sign up on the live site using ONLY that email. OTP will arrive in inbox.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Railway checklist (soothing-creativity → ai-interview-copilot)
----------------------------------------------------------------------

- RESEND_API_KEY must match Resend dashboard (not expired)
- EMAIL_FROM must use a verified domain (Option A) or onboarding@resend.dev (Option B)
- Do NOT set OTP_FALLBACK_IN_API=true unless you want codes in the API response

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Local backend/.env (same variables)
----------------------------------------------------------------------

RESEND_API_KEY=
EMAIL_FROM=Interview Copilot <onboarding@resend.dev>
RESEND_ALLOWED_TEST_EMAIL=your-resend-login@gmail.com
